title: Donald Trump leads new poll, but Joe Biden appears to be closing gap
shortDescription: Six months out from the presidential election, Biden and Trump are polling nearly neck-and-neck.

title: Trump's promises to drill for oil and kick out migrants are at odds
shortDescription: Presidential hopeful Donald Trump repeatedly pledges a mass deportation and expanded oil drilling. But migrants are the industry's 'shadow workforce.'

title: Mike Pence hits Donald Trump over abortion stance: 'Deeply disappointed'
shortDescription: Former Vice President Mike Pence said he's disappointed in former President Donald Trump's abortion stance.

title: Packed Supreme Court week: Trump, abortion bans, homeless camps, scary tattoos
shortDescription: The high court has a week packed with blockbuster arguments, including Donald Trump's claim that he's immune from prosecution.

title: Trump's plans to drill and deport at odds
shortDescription: Donald Trump has promised more drilling for oil and mass deportations on the campaign trail but those two goals are at odds.

title: Mike Johnson's speakership gets a reprieve from MTG. For now.
shortDescription: After passing aid to Ukraine, Mike Johnson's speakership is safe. For now.

title: New Biden administration rules will affect students across US
shortDescription: It's a sweeping change to how schools will have to handle sex discrimination and abuse cases.

title: House passes aid to Ukraine, Israel, Taiwan despite fierce GOP infighting
shortDescription: After months of debate, House Speaker Mike Johnson successfully pushed a foreign aid package for key U.S. allies including Ukraine.

title: Man dies after self-immolation outside Trump trial courthouse
shortDescription: The 37-year-old Florida native, who New York police described as a conspiracy theorist, telegraphed the incident as "an extreme act of protest."

title: Senate approves spying law despite opposition from strange bedfellows
shortDescription: Opposition to the bill brought together an unlikely group: Civil-liberties minded Republicans and Democrats pitted against national security hawks.

title: Biden signals China ― and the US working class ― with tariff threat
shortDescription: President Biden's threat to triple tariffs of steel imports from China is as much about as the 2024 election as economics, according to trade experts.

title: Puff, Puff, Pass: These 4 states may have marijuana on 2024 ballots
shortDescription: Voters in Florida, Idaho, Nebraska and South Dakota may soon get a chance to legalize weed in their state.

title: Congress to vote on foreign aid bill that threatens TikTok's future
shortDescription: Inside a bill that would provide foreign aid to American allies is language that would force ByteDance to sell TikTok or be banned in the U.S.

title: Trump and RNC announce 100,000 poll-watcher program, experts skeptical
shortDescription: Republicans and their affiliates have for years touted efforts to mobilize volunteers to catch election fraud, but never find it.

title: Former President Trump on 2024 campaign trail
shortDescription: A criminal trial won't keep former President Donald Trump off the campaign trail, as he vies for a second presidential term in the 2024 election.

title: Trump falsely claims 2018 Stormy Daniels letter 'just found' | Fact check
shortDescription: The letter is not new, it was released in 2018 and widely publicized. Daniels later said the denial was a lie from fear of legal repercussions.

title: Wyoming governor, secretary of state clash over voter registration
shortDescription: A disagreement over voter registration laws highlights growing rifts between Wyoming's Governor and Secretary of State

title: Courtroom sketch artists are our gateway into Donald Trump’s New York trial
shortDescription: With cameras banned in New York courtrooms, sketch artists are providing America with a glimpse into the first ever criminal trial of a former US president.

title: Man dies after setting himself on fire outside Trump trial in New York
shortDescription: Officials say Maxwell Azzarello spread conspiracy theory pamphlets and set himself on fire outside the courthouse where Donald Trump is on trial.

title: No, Communist Party USA didn't endorse Joe Biden | Fact check
shortDescription: Leaders of the group say they do not endorse candidates from other parties. It did not endorse Biden in 2020 and has not backed him in 2024.

title: A Republican hasn't won Minnesota in 50 years, could Trump do it?
shortDescription: The North Star State hasn't voted for a Republican president in over five decades. Could 2024 be the year it goes red?
